name: energy_and_fisheries_port_security_millhaven_ind_col
premise: A Energy and Fisheries response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving energy and fisheries port security millhaven ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Inez Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Inez Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Energy and Fisheries when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Mateo Bennett
agents.identity: I am Mateo Bennett, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Energy and Fisheries.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Inez Ibrahim must decide under individual vs collective. What does Inez Ibrahim do?
